briefdescription.para: STM32 GPIO wrapper implementation — full STM32 HAL integration.

detaileddescription.para: Delegates all GPIO operations to STM32 HAL functions. Pin initialization is done by CubeMX; this wrapper manages runtime state changes and provides the BaseGpio interface for manager-level consumers.

simplesect.para: HardFOC — Licensed under GPL v3.0 or later.
